commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps the `/tools/invoke` legacy `action` schema probe in a safe helper and adds a Gateway HTTP regression fixture for a schema whose `properties` getter throws.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +28. Total +33 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main reads `schemaObj.properties` during the optional action probe, so a throwing accessor would escape into the broad tool-error path before execution. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair job is appropriate: there is no blocking finding, and the draft/protected maintainer PR should continue through normal maintainer validation.

target.title: fix(gateway): ignore unreadable tool action schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Guard the `/tools/invoke` legacy `action` merge probe against unreadable tool schema `properties` access.
- Preserve invocation when the schema cannot be inspected by treating it as not supporting the legacy top-level `action` shortcut.
- Add HTTP gateway regression coverage for an unreadable schema action probe.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/tools-invoke-http.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` (31 tests)
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/gateway/tools-invoke-shared.ts src/gateway/tools-invoke-http.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/tools-invoke-shared.ts src/gateway/tools-invoke-http.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `/tools/invoke` no longer fails before execution when a plugin/tool schema has an unreadable `properties` accessor during the optional legacy `action` merge probe.

Real environment tested: local Gateway HTTP invoke unit fixture in the OpenClaw worktree.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/tools-invoke-http.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`.

Evidence after fix: the new unreadable-schema regression keeps the response successful and confirms both the hook and tool receive unchanged args without an injected `action` field.

Observed result after fix: `src/gateway/tools-invoke-http.test.ts` passed 31 tests.

What was not tested: full changed gate is pending remote Testbox/Crabbox verification after PR creation.
